zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillipa Bassett於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾希阿丁頓時，她的父親Thomas Basset Lord of Headington25歲，母親Philippa Malbank13歲。她於1229年10月與Richard Siward結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1265年11月29日享年86歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾比斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillipa Bassett于大约1180年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾希阿丁頓时，她的父亲Thomas Basset Lord of Headington25岁，母亲Philippa Malbank13岁。她于1229年10月与Richard Siward结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1265年11月29日享年86岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾比斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Phillipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Phyllis , derived from the genitive case (Greek Phyllidos, Latin Phyllidis) with the addition of the Latin feminine ending -a.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillipa Bassett was born about 1180, in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, was 25 and her mother, Philippa Malbank, was 13. She married Richard Siward in October 1229. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 29 November 1265, at the age of 86, and was buried in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillipa Bassett est née environ 1180, à Headington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Philippa Malbank, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Siward en octobre 1229. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 novembre 1265, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Phillipa Bassett um 1180 in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Basset Lord of Headington 25 und ihre Mutter Philippa Malbank 13. Sie hat im Oktober 1229 Richard Siward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 29. November 1265 im Alter von 86 Jahren und wurde in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Siward nel ottobre 1229. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 29 novembre 1265, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Bicester, Oxfordshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Phillipa Bassett(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 헤딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Basset Lord of Headington(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Malbank(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1229년 10월 Richard Siward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 11월 29일 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipa Bassett nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Malbank, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Siward em outubro de 1229. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1265, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillipa Bassett родилась около 1180 г. в местности хидингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Basset Lord of Headington было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Malbank, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Siward октябрь 1229 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 29 ноября 1265 г. в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Richard Siward en octubre de 1229. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1265, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
